msg.msg_body: Finished File checks and directory preparation: CPU user time: 5.51 seconds. CPU system time: 0.79 seconds. Elapsed time: 14.88 seconds; current allocated memory: 273.500 MB.

Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region (yolo_backbone_3.cpp:304:9)
There are a total of 4 such instances of non-canonical statements in the dataflow region (yolo_backbone_3.cpp:304:9)

Multiple burst reads of length 4096 and bit width 16 in loop 'VITIS_LOOP_228_1'(yolo_backbone_3.cpp:228:23) has been inferred on bundle 'gmem0'.
